nodes.text: Sera counts her wares. 'Raw pelts and timber go through the Market board — that's where caravans trade. My stall downstairs is for finished goods.'

responses.text: You know me well enough to deal straight.
Where do I sell wolf pelts?

nodes.text: 'You've traded enough that I save the good bundles for you. Prices at my finished-goods stall should reflect that — pelts and ore still go on the Market board.'

'Open the Market tab in town. Sell what you carry — it goes into local stock at live prices. Need oak or cloth? Buy it back from the board if traders have listed any. I don't take pelts hand-to-hand anymore.'
